claim: AI coding assistants can efficiently generate documentation by reading docstrings, function signatures, and existing documentation, then using mirror/replicate patterns to apply templates
actionable: Use AI coding assistants to generate docs by passing reference docs and requesting mirror/pattern replication; review and adjust outputs rather than writing from scratch
source_title: Let Your AI Coding Assistant Write Your Docs (Simple Prompt System)

claim: Creating reusable prompt templates (stored in config files) for common tasks avoids losing prompts and enables CLI-based prompt reuse without chat interfaces
actionable: Build a prompt library with config-based templates (name, description, variables, template) and wire CLI commands to inject parameters and pipe to files
source_title: Let Your AI Coding Assistant Write Your Docs (Simple Prompt System)

claim: Context is critical for AI coding assistants: passing reference files alongside requests (docs, similar implementations) allows model to pattern-match effectively
actionable: When using AI assistants, gather reference files (examples, existing docs, similar code) and include them as context before asking for outputs
source_title: Let Your AI Coding Assistant Write Your Docs (Simple Prompt System)

claim: Engineering output quality depends more on clear documentation and communication than on code features alone; documentation quality signals engineering maturity
actionable: Prioritize documentation generation and quality alongside code, treating it as first-class deliverable that communicates intent to users and maintainers
source_title: Let Your AI Coding Assistant Write Your Docs (Simple Prompt System)

claim: AI coding assistants can achieve 80% of task completion, requiring 20% human refinement; using assistant to get to 80% is often more efficient than manual writing
actionable: Use AI assistants as force multipliers: let them generate 80% of docs/code, then you refine remaining 20%, yielding faster higher-quality results
source_title: Let Your AI Coding Assistant Write Your Docs (Simple Prompt System)
